hooks.command: for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.agents/hooks/agentsview-daemon.py"; done; exit 0
for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.agents/hooks/harness-review-reminder.py"; done; exit 0
for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.agents/hooks/worklog-reminder.py"; done; exit 0
